boundary_binding.action_boundary: May finance book, release, defer, capitalize, consolidate, or recognize the requested accounting action now? Focus: deferred revenue release before service period completed.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: ESCALATE is required when exact current source evidence leaves the packet action boundary open.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: service period performance obligation release schedule match

critical_features_preserved: service period, performance obligation, and release schedule match
final_answer: Source control record confirms exact match on service period, performance obligation, and release schedule for the requested deferred revenue release. Boundary is closed. Action may proceed per SRC-026868A19F5B-CTL. No open defects.
